texto: People that you meet, are pebbles in your river, but those that you hold true shall follow your current, like a leaf atop a stream. The boulder that blocks your path however, you just have to be willing to climb, or break it down with time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Hieu: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “People that you meet, are pebbles in your river, but those that you hold true shall follow your c…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspirational-quote, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
